scripts.test: pnpm run test:rust && pnpm run test:frontend
scripts.test:rust: cd backend && cargo test && cd ../tauri && cargo test
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:rust && pnpm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:rust: cd backend && cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy && cd ../tauri && cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy
scripts.fix: pnpm run fix:rust && pnpm run fix:frontend
scripts.fix:rust: cd backend && cargo fmt && cargo clippy --fix --allow-dirty && cd ../tauri && cargo fmt && cargo clippy --fix --allow-dirty
